title: botrychium oneidense
intro: Botrychium oneidense, also known as Oneida grape fern, is a species of fern in the family Ophioglossaceae. This perennial plant is native to North America and is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The rhizome of the plant is used in herbal preparations to treat a variety of health issues, including arthritis, fever, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being.
